name: Flounder with Scallions
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the fish into uniform 1 x 2-inch pieces.
2. Dry the fish pieces thoroughly.
3. Place cornstarch on a plate.
4. In a small bowl, combine egg white, 2 tablespoons of sherry, ground ginger, and pepper.
5. Dip each fish piece first in cornstarch to coat it completely, then dip into the egg white mixture.
6. Heat oil in a wok or large skillet until very hot.
7. When the oil is very hot, add the coated fish pieces and fry them quickly, turning them occasionally to ensure they are golden brown on both sides. Remove the fish to a warm serving dish.
8. Add mushrooms and scallions to the pan and stir-fry for about one minute or two.
9. Return the fish to the pan and pour in the remaining sherry and soy sauce. Stir everything together.
10. Serve immediately.
